topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Tight case study: company profile, problem, what changed, the one number that proves it worked
post:
A Sanad office in Muscat was tracking 40 client work permits across WhatsApp threads, forwarded PDFs, and someone's memory.

Six months later: zero missed renewals.

They moved every permit, renewal date, and client file into SmartPro Hub. One dashboard. Automated renewal alerts. Client updates through a white-label portal instead of a chat thread that gets buried under weekend memes.

No more chasing documents. No more manually counting days to expiry. No more "I thought you were handling that."

Renewals got flagged 60 days out. Clients stopped calling for status updates because they could just log in and see for themselves.

40 permits. Six months. Zero lapses.

That's what SmartPro Hub was built for — closing the gaps where things actually fall through.

PRO service firms and Sanad offices across Oman are running this exact setup now. The ones still on WhatsApp groups are one missed renewal away from losing a client they can't afford to lose.

If you're managing work permits, what does your tracking look like today?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
